_comment: Concurrency and spacing for scene animations and images. Tune per provider quota (Vertex vs Kie). Env overrides: SCENE_VIDEO_VEO_MAX_CONCURRENT, etc. in config/__init__.py

veo_vertex.description: Veo 3.x on Vertex AI — strict quota (~10/min typical)

kling_kie.description: Kling 2.5/2.6 via Kie.ai — moderate parallel, short spacing

none.description: Animation model None — no video API calls

nano_banana_pro_kie.description: Nano Banana Pro (Kie.ai). stagger_seconds: delay before starting each image (0=no stagger, 3=start 1 at 0s, 2 at 3s, 3 at 6s...) to avoid rate limits.

gemini_3_flash_kie.description: Gemini 3 Flash (Kie.ai). stagger_seconds: delay between starting each image request.

nano_banana_2_vertex.description: NANO BANANA 2 / Gemini 3.1 Flash image on Vertex — tested OK at 10 parallel, 8 is safe headroom
